---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "My portfolio includes projects of Bioinformatics, Machine Learning, Web development, and online educational resources." 
listing:
  contents: projects
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-item-border: true
  grid-item-align: left
  max-description-length: 175
  date-format: medium
  page-size: 9
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  image-height: 300px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
